description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow to build Pinocchio for Windows using CLANG via Conda. The workflow should trigger on push to master and devel branches and on pull requests. Use a matrix strategy to run a single job on a Windows 2019 environment with CLANG compiler. Checkout the repository and submodules, set up Miniconda with Python 3.7, install CMake, and then build Pinocchio using CMake and Visual Studio 2019.
